host.title: Hostname or IP
host.description: The hostname or IP address of the Panasonic AiSEG2 controller

password.title: Password
password.description: Password used to login to the Panasonic AiSEG2 controller

synchroColourTone.title: Synchro Colour Tone
synchroColourTone.description: When true, dimmable devices expose a colour temperature characteristic linked to brightness for use with Panasonic Synchro Colour Tone flat lamps.

name.title: Device Name
name.description: Display name of the device as shown in AiSEG2

synchroColourTone.title: Synchro Colour Tone
synchroColourTone.description: When true, this dimmable device exposes a colour temperature characteristic linked to brightness for use with Panasonic Synchro Colour Tone flat lamps.
